data_description.transmitter: The ESPHome RF transmitter entity to use for sending commands.
data_description.remote_id: 16-bit remote identifier in hexadecimal (e.g. F74F). Must match the ID used when pairing the blind.
data_description.model_id: 8-bit model identifier in hexadecimal. Default 01 for BY-305/BF-305.
data_description.channel: Channel number the blind is paired to.

error.invalid_remote_id: Invalid remote ID. Enter a 1-4 digit hexadecimal value (0000-FFFF).
error.invalid_model_id: Invalid model ID. Enter a 1-2 digit hexadecimal value (00-FF).

abort.no_transmitters: No compatible RF transmitters found. Make sure your ESPHome device with remote_transmitter is connected to Home Assistant.
